tech_news.title: I put Google’s 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark to work, and it’s actually pretty useful - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Gemini Spark helps automate everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning, but it’s unclear why Google made it a separate product.

tech_news.title: Microsoft is threatening legal action for disclosing exploits - The Verge
tech_news.description: Microsoft is threatening legal action against a security researcher Nightmare Eclipse for publicly posting vulnerabilities.

tech_news.title: The groupthink boom: what three top VCs really think about the AI frenzy - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: "If you're 22 years old in San Francisco and building something in AI, there may be a seed term sheet in your inbox — but if you're 19, oh my God, this means you're really good; you might already have a Series A ," said one, half-kiddingly.

tech_news.title: The Arduboy FX-C is an excellent time killer you might forget you’re carrying - The Verge
tech_news.description: The Arduboy FX-C’s power and capabilities are limited but it comes with a big library of games that are fun to explore when you’ve got a few minutes to kill.

tech_news.title: Sony Is Wrong To Take ‘Destiny 2’ Support Down To Absolute Zero - Forbes
tech_news.description: When Sony says Destiny 2 is getting no more updates, they truly mean zero, and that is a big mistake for a franchsie this storied.

tech_news.title: Sony takes final bow as stand-alone TV maker with new Bravia sets - The Seattle Times
tech_news.description: Sony unveiled two high-end TVs, which are likely to be its last premium sets before its home theater business merges with TCL Electronics Holdings next year.
